title: Don’t miss this Claude update
summary: Claude Opus 4.8 introduces Dynamic Workflows, which launches hundreds of subagents simultaneously within a single session. The system can split complex work into parallel tasks with built-in verification, allowing faster execution of large-scale projects like codebase analysis and multi-file research.
writeup: The video covers Claude Opus 4.8 and its Dynamic Workflows feature, which launches hundreds of subagents at once inside a single session. The system splits complex work into parallel tasks with built-in verification, speeding up large-scale jobs such as codebase analysis and multi-file research. The takeaway is a move toward parallel multi-agent execution within one model session rather than sequential single-agent runs.
